Kenya's Leading Red Team Experts

Protecting Your Organization Through Human-Centric Security

Based in Kenya, AgwasLab specializes in red team operations including phishing, vishing, smishing, and credential theft testing. We identify weaknesses in your human capital and provide actionable recommendations.

Get Started → Explore Services
Our Expertise

Our Services

Comprehensive security assessments tailored to your organization's needs

Social Engineering Assessments

Comprehensive evaluations of your organization's resistance to social engineering attacks.

Learn More →

Phishing Simulations

Authorized email-based security testing to measure employee susceptibility to phishing attacks.

Learn More →

Smishing & Vishing Tests

SMS and voice-based threat assessments of your organization's vulnerability.

Learn More →

Credential Theft Assessments

Testing of authentication systems and credential handling practices.

Learn More →

Security Awareness Training

Tailored employee education programs based on assessment findings.

Learn More →

Comprehensive Audit Reports

Detailed findings with remediation recommendations and clear metrics.

Learn More →
